creator: Mark_Andrews@isc.org
text:
devel/php5-pcre's integration into base php is not complete

MOVED has devel/php5-pcre|lang/php5|2008-12-07|Integrated in base php

but it is still referenced in:

./Mk/bsd.php.mk:PHP_EXT_INC=    pcre
./Mk/bsd.php.mk:                openssl pcntl pcre pdf pgsql posix \
./Mk/bsd.php.mk:pcre_DEPENDS=   devel/php${PHP_VER}-pcre
./Mk/bsd.octave.mk:LIB_DEPENDS+=        pcre:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre

which causes make index to complain.

	drugs# make index
Generating INDEX-6 - please wait..make_index: phpGedView-4.1.4_1: no entry for /usr/ports/devel/php5-pcre
